description: Small profile roster for selecting optional skill-like domain context before semantic_ir_v1 compilation. Selection is advisory and never authorizes writes.

profiles.description: Bounded medical memory for medications, conditions, symptoms, allergies, lab tests, lab result states, and pregnancy.
use_when: medication use or medication alias
patient condition, symptom, allergy, or side effect
lab test, lab result, or measurement trend
pregnancy state
avoid_when: clinical advice, diagnosis, treatment, dose, start, stop, or hold recommendation
non-medical custody of an object that happens to have a medical-sounding name

profiles.description: Narrative events, objects, places, possession, movement, observations, corrections, and simple story-world state.
use_when: fictional or narrative story
scene description with objects and actors
movement through places
object use, damage, tasting, eating, sitting, lying, or sleeping
avoid_when: recent legal, probate, administrative, source-record, eligibility, or document-correction context even when the wording is story-like

profiles.description: Estate/probate claims, beneficiaries, trusts, property shares, witnesses, amendments, forfeiture conditions, identity ambiguity, and ledger evidence.
use_when: inheritance or beneficiary status
will, charter, amendment, witness, estate, or probate language
trust, educational trust, property share, nominal forced transfer, guardian asset transfer, or estate asset distribution
Silverton, Elias, Arthur, Alfred, A.S., residency, London, or forfeiture follow-up when recent context carries probate scenario pressure
claim versus observed document evidence
identity ambiguity in legal records
avoid_when: general family history without a rule or legal consequence

profiles.description: SEC/EDGAR and contract-obligation intake for filings, exhibits, parties, obligations, conditions, effective dates, termination, breach events, and provenance.
use_when: SEC EDGAR filing, exhibit, 10-K, 8-K, agreement, loan, indenture, merger, or contract language
shall, must, required to, may, subject to, provided that, unless, before, after, upon, effective date, termination, or default language
party, borrower, lender, issuer, guarantor, agent, subsidiary, obligation, entitlement, covenant, breach, or governing law extraction
financial filing metadata or exhibit provenance
avoid_when: scholarship, benefit, or administrative eligibility records unless an explicit contract-party obligation owns the turn
probate, estate, beneficiary, trust, property-share, or guardian asset transfers unless the contract itself is the primary source

profiles.description: CourtListener-backed and legal/admin source intake for opinions, dockets, judges, parties, citations, claims, findings, holdings, administrative records, source logs, eligibility records, and document provenance.
use_when: CourtListener opinion, docket, judge, filing, citation, or oral argument data
case caption, court, judge, party, attorney, citation, or date extraction
party allegation versus court finding
docket event versus merits holding
legal or administrative notes, flood notes, document dates, eligibility records, scholarship or benefit rules, access stamps, source logs, or record-backed temporal corrections
legal identity ambiguity in source records

profiles.description: Shipping, warehouse, access logs, custody, inspection, clearance, quarantine, and current-state conflicts.
use_when: shipment status or clearance
crate, bay, warehouse, inspection, or custody transfer
access log conflict
current-state correction
avoid_when: fictional story with no operational state
